languages.text: "Я... Я не могу, Ваша Светлость. Простите меня, я ошибалась. Благодаря вам я поняла, что мир среди звезд не для меня. Я лучше тут... Кто-то же должен беречь Устав..." {n}Ведка опускает голову.{/n}

"I... I cannot, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Forgive me, I was wrong. You helped me see that I have no place in the world beyond the stars. I should stay... Someone has to uphold the Handbook, after all..." {n}Vedka lowers her head.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я... Я не могу, Ваша Светлость. Простите меня, я ошибалась. Благодаря вам я поняла, что мир среди звезд не для меня. Я лучше тут... Кто-то же должен беречь Устав..." {n}Ведка опускает голову.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I... I cannot, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Forgive me, I was wrong. You helped me see that I have no place in the world beyond the stars. I should stay... Someone has to guard the Code, after all..." {n}Vedka lowers her head.{/n}

"I... I cannot, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Forgive me, I was wrong. You helped me see that I have no place in the world beyond the stars. I should stay... Someone has to guard the Code, after all..." {n}Vedka lowers her head.{/n}

"I... I cannot, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Forgive me, I was wrong. You helped me see that I have no place in the world beyond the stars. I should stay... Someone has to uphold the Code, after all..." {n}Vedka lowers her head.{/n}

"I... I cannot, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Forgive me, I was wrong. You helped me see that I have no place in the world beyond the stars. I should stay... Someone has to uphold the Code, after all..." {n}Vedka lowers her head.{/n}

languages.text: “我……我不能去，大人。请您原谅，是我搞错了。您让我明白，那星辰之外的世界，没有我的容身之地。我应该留下来……总得有人守护这《手册》，毕竟……”{n}薇德卡垂下了头。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I... I cannot, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Forgive me, I was wrong. You helped me see that I have no place in the world beyond the stars. I should stay... Someone has to uphold the Handbook, after all..." {n}Vedka lowers her head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我……我不能去，大人。请您原谅，是我搞错了。您让我明白，那星辰之外的世界，没有我的容身之地。我应该留下来……总得有人守护这《手册》，毕竟……”{n}薇德卡垂下了头。{/n}

languages.text: "Ben... Yapamam {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Beni affedin, yanılmışım. Yıldızların ötesindeki dünyada yerim olmadığını görmemi sağladınız. Kalmalıyım... Sonuçta birinin El Kitabı'nı savunması gerekiyor..." {n}Vedka başını eğiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I... I cannot, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Forgive me, I was wrong. You helped me see that I have no place in the world beyond the stars. I should stay... Someone has to uphold the Handbook, after all..." {n}Vedka lowers her head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ben... Yapamam {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Beni affedin, yanılmışım. Yıldızların ötesindeki dünyada yerim olmadığını görmemi sağladınız. Kalmalıyım... Sonuçta birinin El Kitabı'nı savunması gerekiyor..." {n}Vedka başını eğiyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Je... je ne peux pas, Votre Seigneurie. Pardonnez-moi, mais j'avais tort. Vous m'avez aidée à comprendre que je n'ai pas ma place dans le monde au-delà des étoiles. Je ferais mieux de rester ici... Il faut bien que quelqu'un fasse respecter le Manuel... » {n}Vedka baisse la tête.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I... I cannot, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Forgive me, I was wrong. You helped me see that I have no place in the world beyond the stars. I should stay... Someone has to uphold the Handbook, after all..." {n}Vedka lowers her head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je... je ne peux pas, Votre Seigneurie. Pardonnez-moi, mais j'avais tort. Vous m'avez aidée à comprendre que je n'ai pas ma place dans le monde au-delà des étoiles. Je ferais mieux de rester ici... Il faut bien que quelqu'un fasse respecter le Manuel... » {n}Vedka baisse la tête.{/n}

languages.text: «No... No puedo, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Discúlpeme, estaba equivocada. Me ha ayudado a ver que el mundo más allá de las estrellas no es lugar para mí. Será mejor que me quede... Alguien tiene que hacer cumplir el manual...». {n}Vedka agacha la cabeza.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I... I cannot, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Forgive me, I was wrong. You helped me see that I have no place in the world beyond the stars. I should stay... Someone has to uphold the Handbook, after all..." {n}Vedka lowers her head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No... No puedo, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Discúlpeme, estaba equivocada. Me ha ayudado a ver que el mundo más allá de las estrellas no es lugar para mí. Será mejor que me quede... Alguien tiene que hacer cumplir el manual...». {n}Vedka agacha la cabeza.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich ... Ich kann nicht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Vergebt mir, ich habe mich geirrt. Dank Euch sehe ich nun, dass ich in der Welt jenseits der Sterne keinen Platz habe. Ich sollte bleiben ... Schließlich muss jemand das Handbuch hochhalten ..." {n}Vedka senkt den Kopf.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I... I cannot, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Forgive me, I was wrong. You helped me see that I have no place in the world beyond the stars. I should stay... Someone has to uphold the Handbook, after all..." {n}Vedka lowers her head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich ... Ich kann nicht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Vergebt mir, ich habe mich geirrt. Dank Euch sehe ich nun, dass ich in der Welt jenseits der Sterne keinen Platz habe. Ich sollte bleiben ... Schließlich muss jemand das Handbuch hochhalten ..." {n}Vedka senkt den Kopf.{/n}

languages.text: 「私…私、できません、御{mf|御殿|御嬢}様。許してください、私は間違っていました。御{mf|御殿|御嬢}様のおかげで、私は星の世界以外に居場所がないと気づきました。私は…ここに留まるべきです。結局、誰かが手引き書を守らなければなりません…」{n}ヴェドカは頭を下げる.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I... I cannot, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Forgive me, I was wrong. You helped me see that I have no place in the world beyond the stars. I should stay... Someone has to uphold the Handbook, after all..." {n}Vedka lowers her head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「私…私、できません、御{mf|御殿|御嬢}様。許してください、私は間違っていました。御{mf|御殿|御嬢}様のおかげで、私は星の世界以外に居場所がないと気づきました。私は…ここに留まるべきです。結局、誰かが手引き書を守らなければなりません…」{n}ヴェドカは頭を下げる.{/n}
